errors.description: Bad Request: business connection not found
errors.when: business_connection_id does not refer to an active business connection

errors.description: Bad Request: BUTTON_DATA_INVALID
errors.when: inline keyboard callback_data exceeds 64 bytes

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Can't find end of Bold entity at byte offset 0
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unclosed bold entity

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Can't find end of the entity starting at byte offset 0
errors.when: text with parse_mode Markdown contains an unclosed entity

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Can't find end tag corresponding to start tag "b"
errors.when: text with parse_mode HTML contains an unclosed tag

errors.description: Bad Request: chat_id is empty
errors.when: chat_id parameter is missing

errors.description: Bad Request: chat not found
errors.when: chat_id does not refer to a chat the bot can access

errors.description: Bad Request: EFFECT_ID_INVALID
errors.when: message_effect_id is not valid

errors.description: Bad Request: entity begins after the end of the text at UTF-16 offset 100
errors.when: entities offset is beyond the text length

errors.description: Bad Request: entity beginning at UTF-16 offset 0 ends after the end of the text at UTF-16 offset 100
errors.when: entities offset plus length exceeds the text length

errors.description: Bad Request: FLOODSKIP_NOT_ALLOWED
errors.when: allow_paid_broadcast is true but the bot has insufficient Telegram Stars

errors.description: Bad Request: message text is empty
errors.when: text is missing or empty

errors.description: Bad Request: message thread not found
errors.when: message_thread_id does not refer to an existing forum topic

errors.description: Bad Request: message to be replied not found
errors.when: reply_parameters.message_id does not exist in the target chat

errors.description: Bad Request: message is too long
errors.when: text exceeds 4096 characters

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse MessageEntity: Unsupported type specified
errors.when: entities contains an unsupported type value

errors.description: Bad Request: unsupported parse_mode
errors.when: parse_mode is not HTML, Markdown, or MarkdownV2

errors.description: Bad Request: BUTTON_COPY_TEXT_INVALID
errors.when: copy_text button text is empty or too long

errors.description: Bad Request: BUTTON_QUANTITY_MAX_INVALID
errors.when: request_users.max_quantity exceeds the allowed maximum

errors.description: Bad Request: BUTTON_TYPE_INVALID
errors.when: inline keyboard button type is invalid (e.g. pay without invoice or callback_game without game)

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '-' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped hyphen

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '.' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped period

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '!' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped exclamation mark

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Unmatched end tag at byte offset 10, expected "", found ""
errors.when: text with parse_mode HTML has mismatched closing tags

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Unsupported start tag "script" at byte offset 0
errors.when: text with parse_mode HTML contains a disallowed tag

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Unsupported start tag "invalid" at byte offset 0
errors.when: text with parse_mode HTML contains an unknown tag

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse MessageEntity: Field "custom_emoji_id" must be a valid Number
errors.when: custom_emoji entity has a non-numeric custom_emoji_id

errors.description: Bad Request: receive an entity with incorrect offset -1
errors.when: entities offset is negative

errors.description: Bad Request: entity URL '' is invalid: URL host is empty
errors.when: text_link entity url is empty

errors.description: Bad Request: entity URL 'not-a-url' is invalid: Wrong HTTP URL
errors.when: text_link entity url is not a valid HTTP URL

errors.description: Bad Request: field "force_reply" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: force_reply is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse inline keyboard button: Text buttons are unallowed in the inline keyboard
errors.when: inline keyboard button has empty callback_data and no url

errors.description: Bad Request: inline keyboard button URL 'ftp://example.com' is invalid: Unsupported URL protocol
errors.when: inline keyboard button url uses an unsupported protocol

errors.description: Bad Request: inline keyboard button URL 'not-a-url' is invalid: Wrong HTTP URL
errors.when: inline keyboard button url is not a valid HTTP URL

errors.description: Bad Request: field "inline_keyboard" must be of type Array
errors.when: inline_keyboard is not an array

errors.description: Bad Request: invalid amount of Telegram Stars specified
errors.when: suggested_post_parameters price amount is invalid

errors.description: Bad Request: field "is_persistent" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: reply keyboard is_persistent is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: field "is_disabled" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: link_preview_options.is_disabled is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: bot "nonexistent_bot_xyz_12345" not found
errors.when: login_url bot_username does not refer to an existing bot

errors.description: Bad Request: field "one_time_keyboard" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: reply keyboard one_time_keyboard is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: field "prefer_small_media" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: link_preview_options.prefer_small_media is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: field "remove_keyboard" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: remove_keyboard is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: can't find field "message_id"
errors.when: reply_parameters is set without message_id

errors.description: Bad Request: field "selective" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: reply markup selective is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: suggested posts can be sent only to channel direct messages
errors.when: suggested_post_parameters is used outside a channel direct messages chat

errors.description: Bad Request: user not found
errors.when: text_mention entity user id does not refer to an existing user

errors.description: Bad Request: inline keyboard button Web App URL 'http://example.com' is invalid: Only HTTPS links are allowed
errors.when: web_app button url is HTTP instead of HTTPS

errors.description: Bad Request: inline keyboard button Web App URL 'bad' is invalid: Only HTTPS links are allowed
errors.when: web_app button url is not a valid HTTPS URL

errors.description: Bad Request: WEBPAGE_URL_INVALID
errors.when: link_preview_options.url is not a valid URL

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse inline keyboard button: Field "allow_user_chats" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: switch_inline_query_chosen_chat.allow_user_chats is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: BOT_DOMAIN_INVALID
errors.when: login_url is missing bot_username

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Invalid custom emoji identifier specified
errors.when: HTML tg-emoji tag references an invalid custom emoji id

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Can't find end of Bold entity at byte offset 15
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 has nested formatting with an unclosed bold entity

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '{' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped opening brace

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '=' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped equals sign

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '>' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped greater-than sign

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '#' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped hash sign

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '(' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped opening parenthesis

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '|' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped pipe character

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse entities: Character '+' is reserved and must be escaped with the preceding '\'
errors.when: text with parse_mode MarkdownV2 contains an unescaped plus sign

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse keyboard button: Field "chat_is_forum" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: request_chat.chat_is_forum is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse MessageEntity: Can't find field "custom_emoji_id"
errors.when: custom_emoji entity is missing custom_emoji_id

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse inline keyboard button: Can't find field "text"
errors.when: inline keyboard button is missing text

errors.description: Bad Request: field "keyboard" must be of type Array
errors.when: reply keyboard keyboard is not an array

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse keyboard button: Can't find field "request_id"
errors.when: request_chat or request_users keyboard button is missing request_id

errors.description: Bad Request: keyboard button Web App URL 'http://example.com' is invalid: Only HTTPS links are allowed
errors.when: reply keyboard web_app button url is HTTP instead of HTTPS

errors.description: Bad Request: bot "telegram" not found
errors.when: login_url bot_username refers to a username that is not a bot

errors.description: Bad Request: field "prefer_large_media" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: link_preview_options.prefer_large_media is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse inline keyboard button: Field "request_write_access" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: login_url.request_write_access is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: field "resize_keyboard" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: reply keyboard resize_keyboard is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: field "show_above_text" must be of type Boolean
errors.when: link_preview_options.show_above_text is not a boolean

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse MessageEntity: Can't find field "url"
errors.when: text_link entity is missing url

errors.description: Bad Request: can't parse MessageEntity: Can't find field "user"
errors.when: text_mention entity is missing user

errors.description: Bad Request: text must be non-empty
errors.when: text contains only whitespace or parses to empty content
